rulings.Case Title: SAZHEN LLC DBA BLUSH MASSAGE THERAPY & SPA VS. OK INVESTMENTS INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 17, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANTs OK INVESTMENTS INC and HOMAYOUN NAIMI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurer is sustained on the grounds of uncertainty as to the request for damages. See paragraphs 14 vs. prayer. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges an executed written contract and breach of contract. Additional terms imposed by the defendant are sufficiently alleged. Fraud causes of action are alleged with sufficient particularity. Alter Ego is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)
